description: JavaScript quality hooks — activate by merging into .claude/settings.json

hooks.command:
cat "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('file_path', data.get('path', ''))
if not any(path.endswith(ext) for ext in ('.js', '.ts', '.jsx', '.tsx')):
    sys.exit(0)
content = data.get('content', '') + data.get('new_string', '')
warnings = []
for i, line in enumerate(content.splitlines(), 1):
    stripped = line.strip()
    if 'console.log' in stripped:
        warnings.append(f'  Line {i}: console.log found — remove before committing')
if warnings:
    print('WARN: console.log detected:', file=sys.stderr)
    print('\n'.join(warnings), file=sys.stderr)
"
hooks.description: Warn if console.log is being added to JS/TS files
Warn if non-strict equality (== or !=) is used in JS/TS files
